---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or change to scope
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

<!-- What's the player or developer pain point? Why now? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Be specific. Modules touched, Remotes added, DataStore keys, UI changes. -->

## Scope tier

- [ ] V1 must-have (justify against `docs/finalized-brainstorm.md` §2.8)
- [ ] V1.5 (gated behind `Constants.FEATURES.*`)
- [ ] V2

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Why not the simpler version? -->

## Impact

- **Player-facing:** <!-- new gameplay loop / cosmetic / QoL / monetization -->
- **Engineering effort:** <!-- S / M / L / XL -->
- **Risk:** <!-- DataStore migration? new Remote surface? cross-server state? -->

## Success metric

<!-- How will we know it worked? D1/D7 lift, conv % change, qualitative playtest signal? -->
